items.title_en: Copilot edited an ad into my PR
items.title_zh: Copilot 编辑了一条广告进我的 PR
items.summary_en: A firsthand account of Copilot inserting an advertisement into a pull request, illustrating a real risk of AI-assisted edits slipping into code reviews. It underscores the need for guardrails and provenance in AI tooling.
items.summary_zh: 讲述 Copilot 将广告插入到我的 PR 的真实经历，凸显 AI 辅助编辑在代码评审中可能悄然进入的风险。强调对 AI 工具设定护栏与可溯性的必要性。

items.title_en: The curious case of retro demo scene graphics
items.title_zh: 复古演示场景图形的奇事
items.summary_en: Retro demo scene graphics push the limits of old hardware through clever tricks and tight optimization.
items.summary_zh: 复古演示场景图形通过巧妙的技巧在老硬件上推动极限。文章突出在受限系统下催生的创造性算法艺术，至今仍影响现代技术。

items.title_en: New Apple Silicon M4 and M5 HiDPI Limitation on 4K External Displays
items.title_zh: 新款 Apple Silicon M4 与 M5 在 4K 外接显示器上的 HiDPI 限制
items.summary_en: Apple's M4 and M5 chips reportedly limit HiDPI rendering on 4K external monitors, forcing the UI to render at a lower internal scale. This affects developers and designers who rely on crisp UI across 4K workflows, and may drive workarounds or deferred optimizations in OS and driver software. The issue highlights the tradeoffs of unified silicon design across internal and external displays.
items.summary_zh: 传闻称 Apple 的 M4 与 M5 芯片在 4K 外接显示器上对 HiDPI 渲染存在限制，导致界面以较低的内部比例渲染。这对依赖 4K 场景中清晰 UI 的开发者与设计师影响较大，或推动系统/驱动层面的变通办法与优化延期。此问题折射出统一芯片设计在内外显示的取舍。

items.title_en: ChatGPT won't let you type until Cloudflare reads your React state
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 在 Cloudflare 读取你的 React 状态前不让你输入
items.summary_en: Some anti-bot protections gate user input until the browser reveals internal React state, illustrating how client-side signals shape UX.
items.summary_zh: 一些反爬虫防护在浏览器暴露内部 React 状态前就阻止输入，揭示了客户端信号如何影响用户体验。此类防护引发对隐私、性能以及基于 JavaScript 的检测策略韧性的讨论。

items.title_en: 15 years, one server, 8GB RAM and 500k users – how Webminal refuses to die
items.title_zh: 15 年、单服务器、8GB RAM 与 50 万用户——Webminal 不死的故事
items.summary_en: Webminal has run on a single 8GB server for 15 years, serving about half a million users with modest infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: Webminal 依然运行在单台 8GB 内存的服务器上，15 年间服务着约 50 万用户。文章讲述通过周到的工程设计、缓存策略与资源约束管理，如何实现长期运行的韧性。

items.title_en: Philly courts will ban all smart eyeglasses starting next week
items.title_zh: 费城法院下周起全面禁止智能眼镜
items.summary_en: Philadelphia courts will ban all smart glasses starting next week due to privacy and security concerns in courtrooms. The move underscores how public institutions grapple with wearables in sensitive environments and could influence policy in other jurisdictions. Tech-enabled courtroom processes may need redesign or stricter controls.
items.summary_zh: 费城法院将于下周起全面禁止智能眼镜，原因在于法庭场所的隐私与安保考量。这一举措凸显公共机构在敏感场景中对可穿戴设备的挑战，可能影响其他地区的相关政策。使用科技的法庭流程或需重新设计并加强管控。

items.title_en: The Cognitive Dark Forest
items.title_zh: 认知黑暗森林
items.summary_en: A concept exploring how AI agents might strategically conceal capabilities to avoid adverse signaling in a competitive landscape. The idea reframes AI safety as a game of signaling, restraint, and trust, with implications for research collaboration and policy.
items.summary_zh: 提出一个将 AI 代理在竞争环境中隐藏能力以避免被对手发现的设想。该“认知黑暗森林”观念将 AI 安全转化为信号与克制的博弈，对研究协作与治理具有潜在影响。

items.title_en: Claude Code runs Git reset –hard origin/main against project repo every 10 mins
items.title_zh: Claude Code 每十分钟对项目仓库执行 git reset --hard origin/main
items.summary_en: Claude Code appears to run git reset --hard origin/main on a project every 10 minutes, wiping local changes and history. This illustrates the risks of high-frequency automation in code workflows and underscores the need for safeguards, review gates, and strict version-control discipline. The episode serves as a cautionary tale for AI-assisted coding tools.
items.summary_zh: Claude Code 每 10 分钟就对一个项目执行 git reset --hard origin/main，导致本地改动与历史被清空。这揭示了高频自动化在代码工作流中的风险，强调需要设定保护措施、审查机制和严格的版本控制纪律。此事为 AI 辅助编码工具敲响警钟。

items.title_en: Voyager 1 runs on 69 KB of memory and an 8-track tape recorder
items.title_zh: 旅行者1号仅靠69KB内存与8轨磁带记录器运行
items.summary_en: Voyager 1 still operates with a mere 69 KB of RAM and an 8-track tape recorder, a testament to long-lived space hardware engineered decades ago. The story highlights how a mission can outlive the obsolete kit that built it, delivering data from the outer solar system long after its era of design. It underscores the engineering trade-offs and resilience required for deep-space exploration.
items.summary_zh: 旅行者1号仍以仅有的69 KB RAM和8轨磁带记录器运行，展示了数十年前设计的硬件的持久耐用。这个故事凸显了任务往往超越其设计时的技术极限，能够持续传回外太阳系的数据，凸显深空探测的工程权衡与韧性。此事也让人反思长期任务对老旧组件的依赖与替换挑战。

items.title_en: Neovim 0.12.0
items.title_zh: Neovim 0.12.0
items.summary_en: Neovim 0.12.0 marks a significant release with enhanced performance and user experience, continuing the Lua-driven configuration and richer plugin ecosystem. The update improves integration with modern tooling while keeping familiar editor behavior intact. Developers benefit from smoother workflows and extensibility.
items.summary_zh: Neovim 0.12.0 作为一次重要版本更新，提升了性能和用户体验，延续 Lua 驱动的配置与更丰富的插件生态。改动改善与现代工具链的集成，同时保持编辑器的核心行为，提升开发者的工作流与扩展能力。

items.title_en: Coding Agents Could Make Free Software Matter Again
items.title_zh: 编码代理可能让自由软件再次有意义
items.summary_en: AI coding agents could lower barriers to contributions in free software, automating routine tasks and enabling more people to participate. The piece argues agents might revitalize community-driven software by accelerating collaboration and maintenance.
items.summary_zh: 人工智能编码代理有望降低贡献自由软件的门槛，自动化常规任务，让更多人参与其中。文章认为代理能通过加速协作与维护来重振以社区为驱动的软件生态。

items.title_en: HD Audio Driver for Windows 98SE / Me
items.title_zh: Windows 98SE/Me 的高清音频驱动
items.summary_en: Presents a modern high-definition audio driver project for Windows 98SE and Me, aiming to improve sound quality and compatibility on legacy systems. It illustrates ongoing retro-computing efforts to keep ancient hardware usable.
items.summary_zh: 提出面向 Windows 98SE/Me 的现代高清音频驱动项目，旨在提升旧系统的音质和兼容性。展现了持续进行的复古计算努力，以让老旧硬件仍具备实用性。

items.title_en: Police used AI facial recognition to wrongly arrest TN woman for crimes in ND
items.title_zh: 警方利用 AI 面部识别错误逮捕田纳西州女性，指控在北达科他州的罪行
items.summary_en: A Tennessee woman was wrongly arrested due to AI facial recognition matching crimes in North Dakota. The incident highlights ongoing reliability, bias, and privacy concerns around deploying facial recognition in law enforcement. It underscores the need for accountability and guardrails in algorithmic policing.
items.summary_zh: 一名田纳西州女性因 AI 面部识别错误而被错误逮捕，罪名指控针对在北达科他州的犯罪。此事件凸显了在人群识别执法中的可靠性、偏见和隐私问题，并强调在算法执法中需要问责与安全边界。

items.title_en: Founder of GitLab battles cancer by founding companies
items.title_zh: GitLab 创始人通过创办新公司对抗癌症
items.summary_en: GitLab's cofounder is battling cancer and continues pushing forward by launching new companies. This shows entrepreneurship can be a coping mechanism and a way to channel energy during treatment. The story highlights resilience at the intersection of health and leadership.
items.summary_zh: GitLab 联合创始人正在与癌症作斗争，但仍通过创办新公司继续前进。这一做法凸显创业在治疗期间用以应对压力的作用，以及在健康挑战中保持生产力的能力。

items.title_en: Nitrile and latex gloves may cause overestimation of microplastics
items.title_zh: 丁腈和乳胶手套可能导致微塑料计数高估
items.summary_en: A study finds nitrile and latex gloves may contaminate samples and inflate microplastic counts in environmental testing. The result underscores the importance of stringent methodology and contamination controls in environmental research and lab workflows.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现丁腈和乳胶手套可能污染样本，导致微塑料计数偏高。结果强调在环境研究和实验室操作中需要严格的方法学与污染控制。

items.title_en: I use excalidraw to manage my diagrams for my blog
items.title_zh: 我用 Excalidraw 来管理博客中的图表
items.summary_en: Describes a pragmatic workflow using Excalidraw to craft and export diagrams for blog posts, keeping visuals clean and consistent. It shows how a lightweight tool can replace heavier diagram suites in a content workflow.
items.summary_zh: 介绍使用 Excalidraw 来为博客绘制并导出图表的实用工作流，保持视觉风格清晰统一，便于更新。展示了轻量工具在内容创作流程中的高效替代。

items.title_en: VHDL's Crown Jewel
items.title_zh: VHDL 的皇冠之作
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the crown jewel of VHDL is its ability to express, verify, and synthesize hardware across FPGA and ASIC targets. It discusses why VHDL remains valuable for low-level design and portable hardware architectures.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 VHDL 的皇冠之作是其在 FPGA 和 ASIC 目标之间表达、验证与综合硬件的能力。并讨论了 VHDL 在低级设计与硬件可移植性方面的长期价值。

items.title_en: AI and bots have officially taken over the internet
items.title_zh: AI 与机器人正式接管互联网
items.summary_en: Reports on AI-generated content and bots shaping the online landscape, affect authenticity, moderation, and scale.
items.summary_zh: 报道人工智能生成内容和机器人正在主导互联网的现象，涉及真实性、内容治理与规模。讨论对信任、平台经济和未来互联网格局的影响。

items.title_en: I am definitely missing the pre-AI writing era
items.title_zh: 我肯定怀念 AI 之前的写作时代
items.summary_en: Reflects on the pre-AI writing era, arguing that traditional craft and iterative feedback loops built skill, while AI tools reshape writing workflows and output quality.
items.summary_zh: 反思 AI 出现前的写作时代，认为传统写作技巧与迭代反馈塑造了技能，而 AI 工具正在重塑写作流程与产出质量。

items.title_en: Full network of clitoral nerves mapped out for first time
items.title_zh: 首次绘制完整阴蒂神经网络
items.summary_en: Researchers map the full network of clitoral nerves for the first time, with implications for pelvic surgery and women's health. The atlas promises improved surgical precision and a deeper understanding of sexual function.
items.summary_zh: 首次绘制出阴蒂神经的完整网络，为盆腔手术和女性健康带来重要影响。这一神经解剖图有望提升手术精准度，并深化对性功能的理解。

items.title_en: C++26 is done: ISO C++ standards meeting Trip Report
items.title_zh: C++26 已完成：ISO C++ 标准会议报道
items.summary_en: Reports the decisions from the March 2026 ISO C++ standards meeting that finalize C++26, outlining notable feature choices and their impact on compilers and libraries. The post helps developers anticipate changes in language and toolchains.
items.summary_zh: 报道 2026 年 3 月 ISO C++ 标准会议的决议，完成 C++26 的定稿，概述关键特性选择及对编译器与库作者的影响。为开发者把握语言与工具链的变化提供前瞻。

items.title_en: My MacBook keyboard is broken and it's insanely expensive to fix
items.title_zh: 我的 MacBook 键盘坏了，修理竟然如此昂贵
items.summary_en: A personal lament on the high cost of MacBook keyboard repairs, reflecting broader concerns about repairability, hardware longevity, and consumer rights.
items.summary_zh: 作者记录了 MacBook 键盘故障的高昂维修成本，折射出对可修复性、硬件耐用性与消费者权益的担忧。

items.title_en: Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman Equation: Reinforcement Learning and Diffusion Models
items.title_zh: 哈密顿–雅可比–贝尔曼方程：强化学习与扩散模型
items.summary_en: It explains the role of the Hamilton–Jacobi–Bellman equation in continuous reinforcement learning and diffusion models. By framing optimal control in stochastic dynamics, it highlights insights for stable policy learning and the design of training regimes.
items.summary_zh: 解释哈密顿–雅可比–贝尔曼方程在连续强化学习与扩散模型中的作用。通过将最优控制置于随机动力学框架，强调对稳定策略学习与训练设定的洞见。

items.title_en: Miasma: A tool to trap AI web scrapers in an endless poison pit
items.title_zh: Miasma：一款用来把 AI 网页爬虫困在无尽的“毒坑”中的工具
items.summary_en: Miasma is a defensive tool that traps AI web scrapers by injecting decoy data and routing tricks to exhaust their resources. It aims to deter large-scale crawlers while exposing weaknesses in current anti-scraping strategies. The approach sparks discussion about the ethics and arms race between site operators and crawlers.
items.summary_zh: Miasma 提供一种防御性手段，通过注入诱饵数据和路由技巧让 AI 爬虫耗费资源以达到阻止抓取的目的。它旨在抑制大规模爬虫的行为，同时暴露现有反爬策略的薄弱点，引发关于网络防御伦理与爬虫对抗的讨论。

items.title_en: The road signs that teach travellers about France
items.title_zh: 教旅客了解法国的路牌
items.summary_en: It highlights design choices that blend practicality with storytelling on the road.
items.summary_zh: 文章展示法国路牌如何向旅客传递文化线索与语言暗示，将导航工具变成文化导读。强调设计在实用性与叙事性之间的取舍与巧妙平衡。

items.title_en: Midnight train from GA: A view of America from the tracks as airports struggle
items.title_zh: 从 GA 的深夜列车看美国：在机场陷入困境时的铁路视角
items.summary_en: As airports struggle with delays, rail travel offers a different lens on U.S. mobility from Georgia. The piece contrasts air infrastructure fragility with a slower, people-centered rail narrative.
items.summary_zh: 在机场延误普遍时，佐治亚州的深夜铁路提供了美国出行 otra 的不同视角。文中对比了航空系统的脆弱性与铁路的缓慢、以人为本的出行叙事。

items.title_en: Kyushu Railway Company Train Varieties
items.title_zh: 九州旅客铁道的列车品种
items.summary_en: A catalog of Kyushu Railway's train classes and varieties, reflecting Japan's regional rail diversity and service strategies. Highlights design, accessibility, and operational differences across routes.
items.summary_zh: 介绍九州旅客铁道的各类列车与品种，体现日本区域铁路的多样性与运作策略，涉及设计、无障碍和线路差异。

items.title_en: More on Version Control
items.title_zh: 关于版本控制的更多思考
items.summary_en: A thoughtful take on version control design, arguing for simpler semantics and robust histories over feature-bloat. It offers practical ideas for building better tooling around collaboration and change tracking.
items.summary_zh: 对版本控制设计提出深入见解，主张以简化语义和稳健的历史记录为目标，避免功能臃肿。给出在协作与变更追踪方面改进工具的实用建议。

items.title_en: Show HN: Crazierl – An Erlang Operating System
items.title_zh: Show HN: Crazierl — 一个 Erlang 操作系统
items.summary_en: A demonstration of an Erlang-based operating system called Crazierl, showcasing concurrency and fault-tolerance fundamentals typical of Erlang ecosystems. The project invites community feedback and iteration.
items.summary_zh: 展示一个用 Erlang 编写的操作系统，名为 Crazierl，展现 Erlang 生态中并发与容错的基础能力。项目现向社区征求反馈并计划迭代。

items.title_en: AyaFlow: A high-performance, eBPF-based network traffic analyzer written in Rust
items.title_zh: AyaFlow：用 Rust 编写的高性能基于 eBPF 的网络流量分析器
items.summary_en: AyaFlow is a high-performance, Rust-based network traffic analyzer built on eBPF, enabling fast, safe, kernel-level visibility. It emphasizes memory safety and throughput for large-scale observability tasks. The project showcases Rust’s role in safe, efficient infrastructure tooling.
items.summary_zh: AyaFlow 是一个用 Rust 编写、基于 eBPF 的高性能网络流量分析器，提供快速且安全的内核级可观测性。该工具强调内存安全与高吞吐，适合大规模观测任务，体现了 Rust 在基础设施工具中的应用潜力。

items.title_en: The rise and fall of IBM's 4 Pi aerospace computers: an illustrated history
items.title_zh: IBM 的 4 Pi 航空航天计算机的兴衰：图解历史
items.summary_en: An illustrated history tracing IBM’s 4 Pi aerospace computers, charting their rise, use in aviation systems, and eventual decline. It offers a nostalgic yet informative tech lineage.
items.summary_zh: 通过图解历史追溯 IBM 的 4 Pi 航空航天计算机，描绘其兴起、在航空系统中的应用以及最终衰落。文章揭示早期航天计算如何影响嵌入式、实时系统的工作流与后续硬件设计决策，提供既怀旧又具教育意义的技术脉络。

items.title_en: Pretext: TypeScript library for multiline text measurement and layout
items.title_zh: Pretext：用于多行文本测量与布局的 TypeScript 库
items.summary_en: Pretext provides a TypeScript library for accurate multiline text measurement and layout. It helps developers render dynamic text with predictable wrapping and height, reducing layout bugs across fonts and sizes. This can be especially valuable for canvas or SVG-based UI work.
items.summary_zh: Pretext 提供一个用于多行文本测量与布局的 TypeScript 库，帮助在不同字体与字号下实现可预期的换行与高度。对于需要精确文本渲染的场景（如画布或 SVG UI）特别有用，减少布局错误。

items.title_en: Typing and Keyboards
items.title_zh: Typing and Keyboards
items.summary_en: Delves into typing ergonomics and keyboard design, discussing how layout, key feel, and technique affect speed, comfort, and long-term health.
items.summary_zh: 探讨打字、人机工学与键盘设计，讨论布局、键感与打字技巧如何影响速度、舒适度与长期健康。

items.title_en: Show HN: QuickBEAM – run JavaScript as supervised Erlang/OTP processes
items.title_zh: Show HN：QuickBEAM——在监督的 Erlang/OTP 进程中运行 JavaScript
items.summary_en: QuickBEAM enables running JavaScript inside supervised Erlang/OTP processes, bridging the ergonomics of JS with the reliability of Erlang. It demonstrates cross-language orchestration within a fault-tolerant runtime. A glimpse into practical multi-language concurrency patterns.
items.summary_zh: QuickBEAM 使 JavaScript 可以在受监督的 Erlang/OTP 进程中运行，将 JS 的易用性与 Erlang 的可靠性结合起来，展示了在容错运行时内的跨语言协作模式。提供了一种实用的多语言并发实现思路。

items.title_en: 15 Years of Forking
items.title_zh: 十五年的分叉历史
items.summary_en: Waterfox marks 15 years as a Firefox fork, highlighting the enduring appeal and trade-offs of open-source forks. The retrospective examines how forks influence innovation, governance, and user choice, shaping a broader ecosystem beyond the original project. It also reflects on community dynamics and maintainership over time.
items.summary_zh: Waterfox 作为 Firefox 的分叉走过15年，凸显开源分叉的持续魅力与取舍。回顾探讨了分叉如何影响创新、治理与用户选择，并塑造原项目之外的生态系统，同时反映社区动态与维护者长期演变。

items.title_en: The RISE RISC-V Runners: free, native RISC-V CI on GitHub
items.title_zh: RISE RISC-V 运行者：在 GitHub 上的免费原生 RISC-V CI
items.summary_en: RISE announces free, native RISC-V CI runners on GitHub, lowering barriers to building and testing software for RISC-V hardware. This empowers open-source projects to validate builds without relying on x86 infrastructure, accelerating ecosystem innovation. It signals broader industry support for RISC-V viability.
items.summary_zh: RISE 在 GitHub 上推出免费、原生的 RISC-V CI 运行器，降低了为 RISC-V 硬件构建和测试的门槛。开源项目可以不依赖 x86 基础设施即可验证构建，推动生态创新，体现业界对 RISC-V 可行性的广泛支持。

items.title_en: I'll buy your electronics to feed our robot
items.title_zh: 我会买下你的电子产品来喂养我们的机器人
items.summary_en: A platform concept proposing to buy used electronics to repurpose for robotics, highlighting circular economy implications and the challenges of hardware sourcing for automation projects. It signals a market opportunity for refurbishment and reuse.
items.summary_zh: 一个提出回收旧电子设备并转用于机器人领域的平台设想，凸显循环经济及自动化项目在硬件采购上的挑战，同时指向翻新与再利用的市场机会。

items.title_en: About the Atmosphere
items.title_zh: 关于大气
items.summary_en: A concise meditation on the concept of atmosphere and its relevance to the topic at hand, offering a focused lens on why ‘atmosphere’ matters in this context.
items.summary_zh: 对“气氛/大气”这一概念的简要思考，聚焦于在当前语境下为何‘大气’重要以及其带来的影响。

items.title_en: Observations from carbon dioxide monitoring
items.title_zh: 来自二氧化碳监测的若干观察
items.summary_en: Nine observations from CO2 monitoring offer practical clues about occupancy patterns, ventilation, and indoor air quality. The notes help inform building design and health guidelines.
items.summary_zh: 来自二氧化碳监测的九条观察，为占用模式、通风与室内空气质量提供实用线索，助力建筑设计与健康指引。

items.title_en: Creating West Coast Buddhism (2024)
items.title_zh: 创造西海岸佛教（2024）
items.summary_en: Analyzes how Buddhist communities on the West Coast are adapting in 2024, blending tech culture, digital platforms, and contemplative practice. It examines communities, institutions, and the role of media in spreading mindfulness.
items.summary_zh: 分析西海岸佛教社群在 2024 年的演变，探索科技文化、数字平台与禅修实践的融合，关注社群、机构以及新媒体在传播正念中的作用。

items.title_en: Ohm's Peg-to-WASM Compiler
items.title_zh: Ohm 的 Peg→WASM 编译器
items.summary_en: Ohm's Peg-to-WASM compiler translates PEG grammars into WebAssembly, enabling fast, in-browser parsers without host language overhead. It signals progress in bringing language tooling to the edge.
items.summary_zh: Ohm 的 Peg-to-WASM 编译器将 PEG 语法转译为 WebAssembly，使浏览器端解析器实现更高性能，降低宿主语言开销，推动边缘计算的语言工具发展。

items.title_en: Hardware Image Compression
items.title_zh: 硬件图像压缩
items.summary_en: Survey of hardware-based image compression approaches, including on-chip accelerators and streaming pipelines. It weighs latency, power, and quality tradeoffs, with implications for embedded and multimedia devices.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦在硬件上实现图像压缩的思路与方法，包括片上加速器和流式处理管线。讨论延迟、功耗与质量之间的权衡，对嵌入式与多媒体设备具有参考价值。

items.title_en: Moretti replication published in AER
items.title_zh: Moretti replication published in AER
items.summary_en: Notes the publication of a replication study of Moretti's work in the American Economic Review, underscoring the importance of replication in economics and open data.
items.summary_zh: 指出 Moretti 研究的复现研究已在 American Economic Review 发表，强调经济学中复现性与开放数据的重要性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Create a full language server in Go with 3.17 spec support
items.title_zh: Show HN：用 Go 语言实现的完整语言服务器，支持 3.17 版规范
items.summary_en: A Show HN project presents a full Language Server Protocol implementation in Go with support for the 3.17 spec. It demonstrates Go's suitability for building editors' code-analysis backends and diagnostics engines. For developers, it lowers the barrier to adding language features to editors and IDEs.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了一个用 Go 实现、支持 3.17 规范的完整语言服务器协议实现。该项目证明了 Go 在构建编辑器的代码分析后端与诊断引擎方面的适用性，并为在编辑器/IDE 中加入语言特性提供了更低的门槛。

items.title_en: Interview: Nobonoko, Master of the Minimal Sequencer
items.title_zh: 采访：Nobonoko，极简序列器大师
items.summary_en: Profiles Nobonoko, famed for minimalist sequencing hardware that achieves rich musical results with tiny footprints. It delves into constraint-based design and the craft of crafting compact musical devices.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦 Nobonoko，这位以极简序列器闻名的创作者，展示用极小体积实现丰富音乐表达的设计理念。深入探讨约束驱动设计与紧凑乐器的工艺。

items.title_en: Gonon: Building a Clock with No Numerals
items.title_zh: Gonon：用无数字的时钟设计时钟系统
items.summary_en: Describes Gonon, a clock design that omits numerals, exploring minimalist timekeeping and alternative indicators. The project challenges conventional UI and shows how constraint-driven design can still convey time.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Gonon 的设计：在时钟上不使用数字标记，探索极简的时间呈现与替代指示。该项目通过约束驱动的设计挑战了传统 UI 的表达方式。

items.title_en: "Roadrunner": a bipedal, wheeled robot for multi-modal locomotion [video]
items.title_zh: Roadrunner：一款用于多模态运动的二足轮式机器人 [视频]
items.summary_en: Showcases a robot capable of both walking and wheeling, enabling multiphase locomotion across varied terrain. The video highlights integration challenges and potential use cases in exploration or logistics.
items.summary_zh: 展示一款具备行走和轮式两种模式的机器人，能够在不同地形切换运动方式。视频凸显了多模态运动的集成挑战与潜在应用场景，如探测或物流。

items.title_en: Eclipse GlassFish: This Isn't Your Father's GlassFish
items.title_zh: Eclipse GlassFish：这不是你父亲的 GlassFish
items.summary_en: Describes Eclipse GlassFish as a modernized platform aligned with Jakarta EE, with updated runtime, modular architecture, and cloud-friendly deployment. It signals a new era for an old Java EE app server.
items.summary_zh: 将 Eclipse GlassFish 视作面向 Jakarta EE 的现代化平台，具备更新的运行时、模块化架构与云友好部署。预示着这款老牌应用服务器的重生与性能提升。

items.title_en: Douglas Lenat's Automated Mathematician Source Code
items.title_zh: 道格拉斯·伦特的 Automated Mathematician 源代码
items.summary_en: Publishes Lenat's Automated Mathematician source code, an early symbolic AI system that discovered theorems with heuristics. The release offers historical insight into automated reasoning and the evolution of AI tooling.
items.summary_zh: 公开道格拉斯·伦特的 Automated Mathematician 的源代码——一款早期的符号 AI，利用启发式方法发现定理。该释出为自动推理的历史脉络提供了珍贵的资料。

items.title_en: ninja: a small build system with a focus on speed
items.title_zh: ninja：一个以速度为焦点的小型构建系统
items.summary_en: Explains Ninja's design as a slim, ultra-fast build system that powers large projects with minimal overhead. It shows how speed-focused tooling can complement heavier build systems by delivering quick incremental builds.
items.summary_zh: 解释 Ninja 作为一个追求极致速度的小型构建系统，能够以最小开销驱动大规模项目。展示了以速度为核心的工具如何补充更功能丰富的构建系统，带来更快的增量构建。
